command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "cat > /tmp/fix_openclaw.py << 'PYEOF'
import json
path = '/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'
with open(path) as f:
    c = json.load(f)
# Fix primary model
c['agents']['defaults']['model']['primary'] = 'ollama/llama3.2:latest'
# Remove llama3.1:8b from models list since it does not exist on desktop
if 'ollama/llama3.1:8b' in c['agents']['defaults']['models']:
    del c['agents']['defaults']['models']['ollama/llama3.1:8b']
with open(path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(c, f, indent=2)
print('done - primary set to ollama/llama3.2:latest')
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/fix_openclaw.py"
